zh.lifeSummary: 當Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V於大約1162年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Rasse de Gavre VII24歲，母親Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne24歲。他於大約1179年與Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫海爾澤勒結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1244年在比利時布拉班特阿福利格姆享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V于大约1162年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Rasse de Gavre VII24岁，母亲Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne24岁。他于大约1179年与Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫海爾澤勒结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1244年在比利时布拉班特阿福利格姆享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: GAVRE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Cecile, Chantal, Francoise, Jacques, Julien, Laurent.
French: occupational name for a blacksmith or ironworker, from a regional form of Old French fevre (see Lefevre ). Compare Farve and Faver .

variants.name: Faver
meanings: Altered form of French Favre ‘blacksmith’ or of its cognate Lefèvre (see Lefevre ). Compare Favor .
English: probably in most cases an altered form of   Feaver  , partly because between the 16th and the 18th centuries its pronunciation was sometimes identical with the word favour (see 4 below).
English: occasionally perhaps also a nickname from Middle English (Old French) favo(u)r, Middle English faver ‘help, beauty, grace, benevolence’.

variants.name: Lefevre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Emile, Jacques, Joffre, Luc, Adrien, Antoine, Armand, Camille, Eunide, Francois, Germaine.

French and Walloon (Lefèvre): occupational name for a blacksmith or ironworker, Old French fevre, with fused masculine definite article le. One of the most common surnames in France from an early date, coined before the French word for smith, fèvre (from Latin faber ‘maker’), was replaced by forgeron. This surname was also brought to England (in the 16th century by Protestant Walloons and later reinforced by Huguenots from France). It is also established in the Flemish part of Belgium and in Haiti. See also Lefebvre , compare Faver , Lafaver , Lafever , Lefever , and Leffew .

History: This surname is listed (in the form Le Fèvre) in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America (in the form Le Fevre).

variants.name: Favret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Andre, Chantel, Raoul.
French: diminutive of   Favre   ‘blacksmith’.

variants.name: Farve
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile.
Altered form of French   Favre   ‘blacksmith’.

nameMeanings.name: Rasse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Erwin, Horst, Arno, Frieda, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans.
German: variant of   Hass   1.
English: topographic name denoting a dweller by coarse grass, Old English hasse, or a habitational name from a minor place called with this word, such as The Hasse in Soham (Cambridgshire).

variants.name: Hass
meanings: Pet form of   Johannes .

en.lifeSummary: When Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V was born about 1162, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Rasse de Gavre VII, was 24 and his mother, Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne, was 24. He married Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele about 1179, in Herzele, East Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1244, in Affligem, Brabant, Belgium, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V est né environ 1162, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Rasse de Gavre VII, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele environ 1179, à Herzele, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1244, à Affligem, Brabant, Belgique, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V um 1162 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rasse de Gavre VII 24 und seine Mutter Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne 24. Er hat um 1179 in Herzele, Ostflandern, Belgien Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Affligem, Brabant, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V è nato il circa 1162 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Rasse de Gavre VII, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele circa 1179, nel Herzele, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1244, nel Affligem, Brabante, Belgio, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE Vが約1162年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Rasse de Gavre VIIは24歳，母Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogneは24歳であった。約1179年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンハーズエルでClaire D’Eksaerde van Herzeleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1244年にベルギーブラバントアフリジェムで83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V(이)가 대략 1162년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rasse de Gavre VII(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1179년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 허즈일에서 Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 벨기에 브라반트 아플리그에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V nasceu aproximadamente 1162, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Rasse de Gavre VII, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele aproximadamente 1179, em Herzele, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Affligem, Brabante, Bélgica, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V родился около 1162 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Rasse de Gavre VII было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele около 1179 г. в местности хирзель, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности аффлигем, брабант, Бельгия в возрасте 83 лет.

sm.from 1190 to 1224: mai le 1190 e o'o I le 1224

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V nació aproximadamente 1162, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Rasse de Gavre VII, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mathilde van Liedekerke van Gendt d'Alost de Boulogne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele aproximadamente 1179, en Herzele, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1244, en Affligem, Brabante, Bélgica, a la edad de 83 años.
